Page 1 — Clean Page 2 — All Templates Page 3 — Chosen Approved templates only — these are wired to the pipeline

Chosen Ones

Oak Park AI Hub · approved + locked · one per series · pipeline-ready

ROW 1 — Full Carousel Formats
OPC — Oak Park Construction
#0A0A0A
Obsidian
#CBCC10
Lime
#F0EBE3
Cream
TIP OF THE WEEK
FORMAT-010
OPC · full carousel format · 5 slides
Weekly educational post. One construction or renovation concept — stat on slide 2, step-by-step list on slide 3, product/material callout on slide 4, CTA on slide 5. No named person required. Use arrows to navigate all 5 slides. 3 color variants.
slide 1 / 5
News — Brazil · Full Formats
#0D0B08
Ink
#C9A84C
Gold
#F0EBE3
Parchment
Brazil — Cover · Base 1
FORMAT-COVER-BR-BASE · ✓ APPROVED
Brazil News · base cover · all series
Approved base cover for ALL Brazil news stories. Dark background + canário gold (#C9A84C). Corner brackets 64px safe margin, Playfair serif headline with italic gold accent word, portrait sticker card top-right (310×410px), person attribution pill bottom-left. Pipeline: inject .bg-photo + .sticker-slot.
slide 1 / 1
Brazil — WHO IS THIS PERSON?
FORMAT-020 · BR · ✓ APPROVED
Brazil News · biographical carousel set · 2 slides
FORMAT-020 complete set — use variant buttons to preview each slide. Biography: 2-col fact grid (6 bilingual fields), controversy pills. Network: hub-and-spoke diagram, 8 nodes at 45° with dashed gold lines. Both use InBr gold (#C9A84C). Pipeline fills fields + node names. PT-BR.
slide 1 / 1
News — USA · Full Formats
#0D0B08
Ink
#CC1F2D
Signal Red
#E8DECE
Parchment
USA — Cover · Base 1
FORMAT-COVER-US-BASE · ✓ APPROVED
USA News · base cover · all series
Approved base cover for ALL USA news stories. Same design language as Brazil Base 1. Signal red (#CC1F2D) replaces canário gold everywhere — corners, sticker frame, accent word, person pill border. Dark background + parchment text. Pipeline: inject .bg-photo + .sticker-slot.
slide 1 / 1
USA — WHO IS THIS PERSON?
FORMAT-020 · US · ✓ APPROVED
USA News · biographical carousel set · 2 slides
FORMAT-020 complete set — use variant buttons to preview each slide. Biography: 2-col fact grid (6 fields in English), controversies pills. Network: hub-and-spoke diagram, 8 nodes at 45° with dashed red lines. Both use InUS signal red (#CC1F2D). Pipeline fills fields + node names. EN.
slide 1 / 1
ROW 2 — Standalone Slides · Mix & Match into Any Carousel
News — Brazil · Standalone Slides
Brazil — Statement · Mid-Carousel
FORMAT-STATEMENT-BR · ✓ APPROVED
Brazil News · body slide · quote or analysis
Mid-carousel quote slide. Quote opener (bold italic) + body text + attribution on black left zone. Person photo right with red duotone + diagonal divider. InBr logo bottom-left. Use for any slide quoting a named person. PT-BR.
slide 1 / 1
Brazil — Biography · Quem é?
FORMAT-020-BIO-BR · ✓ APPROVED
Brazil News · standalone · biographical info slide
Dark background. Large Playfair "Quem é / [name]?" (italic gold), divider diamond rule, 2-col fact grid: NASCIMENTO·BORN, BACKGROUND, VIRADA·TURNING POINT, MISSÃO·MISSION, PLATAFORMA, ESTILO·STYLE — all 24px Roboto Condensed for IG readability. Bottom: tópicos polêmicos pills. InBr gold (#C9A84C). FORMAT-020 slide 1.
slide 1 / 1
Brazil — Network · Conexões
FORMAT-020-NET-BR · ✓ APPROVED
Brazil News · standalone · network diagram slide
Hub-and-spoke connection map. "REDE & CONEXÕES" + Playfair "Pessoas Poderosas & Famosas". 840×840 diagram: center node (130px circle) + 8 satellites (100px circles) at 45° intervals, dashed gold SVG lines with arrowheads. Pipeline injects initials + names into each node. InBr gold (#C9A84C). FORMAT-020 slide 3.
slide 1 / 1
Brazil — Cover · Main Character
FORMAT-STANDALONE-BR · ⚠️ PENDING REVIEW
Brazil News · standalone cover · named person
Split-screen dark cover. Black left zone (InBr logo + bold condensed headline). Right zone: person photo with red duotone + torn paper left edge. CSS handles grayscale+duotone — pipeline drops photo, never touches filters. Not yet approved — split-screen layout under review. PT-BR.
slide 1 / 1
News — USA · Standalone Slides
USA — Cover · Main Character
FORMAT-STANDALONE-US · ⚠️ PENDING REVIEW
USA News · standalone cover · named person
Split-screen dark cover. Black left zone (InUS logo + bold condensed headline). Right zone: person photo with blue duotone + torn paper edge. Mirror of Brazil Cover. Not yet approved — split-screen layout under review. EN.
slide 1 / 1
USA — Statement · Mid-Carousel
FORMAT-STATEMENT-US · ✓ APPROVED
USA News · body slide · quote or analysis
Mid-carousel quote slide. Quote opener (bold italic) + body text + attribution on black left zone. Person photo right with blue duotone + diagonal divider. InUS logo bottom-left. Mirror of Brazil Statement. EN.
slide 1 / 1
USA — Biography · Who Is?
FORMAT-020-BIO-US · ✓ APPROVED
USA News · standalone · biographical info slide
Dark background. Large Playfair "Who is / [name]?" (italic red), divider diamond rule, 2-col fact grid: BORN, BACKGROUND, TURNING POINT, MISSION, PLATFORM, STYLE — all 24px Roboto Condensed for IG readability. Bottom: key controversies pills. InUS signal red (#CC1F2D). FORMAT-020 slide 1.
slide 1 / 1
USA — Network · Connections
FORMAT-020-NET-US · ✓ APPROVED
USA News · standalone · network diagram slide
Hub-and-spoke connection map. "NETWORK & CONNECTIONS" + Playfair "Powerful People & Ties". 840×840 diagram: center node (130px) + 8 satellites (100px) at 45°, dashed red SVG lines with arrowheads. Pipeline injects initials + names. InUS signal red (#CC1F2D). FORMAT-020 slide 3.
slide 1 / 1
